schema.name: CiscoUmbrellaFileEvent_CL
schema.description: The Cisco Secure Access File Events log shows your organization's traffic events involving file access that match private access rules with File Inspection or File Type Control enabled.

columns.name: Timestamp
columns.description: The date and time of the request transaction, expressed as a UTC-formatted string.

columns.name: OrganizationId
columns.description: The Secure Access organization ID.

columns.name: RetentionPolicy
columns.description: The number of days that AWS S3 stores your Secure Access File Events log.

columns.name: AwsRegion
columns.description: The AWS region where Secure Access stores your logs.

columns.name: FirewallEventId
columns.description: The ID of the firewall event. Populated only for traffic handled by Cisco Secure Firewall.

columns.name: FileAction
columns.description: The action taken on a file in a remote browser isolation session.

columns.name: Disposition
columns.description: The status of the files proxied and scanned by Cisco Advanced Malware Protection (AMP) as part of the File Inspection feature. Valid values are: CLEAN, MALWARE, UNKNOWN.

columns.name: Sha256
columns.description: The SHA-256 checksum hash of the file.

columns.name: Direction
columns.description: The traffic direction of the file event. Valid values are: UNKNOWN, UPLOAD, DOWNLOAD.

columns.name: ThreatName
columns.description: Name of the threat identified for files with MALWARE disposition.

columns.name: FileStaticAnalysis
columns.description: The status of the file static sample analysis.

columns.name: ThreatScore
columns.description: The threat score most recently associated with this file. This is a value from 0 to 100.

columns.name: FileTypeId
columns.description: The type of file. For example, PDF or MSEXE.

columns.name: FileName
columns.description: The name of the file involved with the activity.

columns.name: FileSize
columns.description: The size of the file in bytes.

columns.name: ArchiveFileName
columns.description: The name of the archive file involved with the activity.

columns.name: ArchiveDepth
columns.description: The level (if any) at which the file was nested in an archive file.

columns.name: ArchiveSha
columns.description: The SHA-256 checksum hash of the archive file.

columns.name: DlpStatus
columns.description: The verdict of the DLP scanning service.

columns.name: EnforcedBy
columns.description: The Secure Access component or service that enforced the policy or control related to this event (e.g., Firewall, Web Proxy).

columns.name: FtdEnforcementId
columns.description: The unique identifier of the enforcement action taken by a Firepower Threat Defense (FTD) device integrated with Secure Access.

columns.name: FtdEnforcementName
columns.description: The name or type of enforcement action taken by a FTD device integrated with Secure Access (e.g., Malware Block, URL Category Block).
